step_rationale: Plasma biomarker upregulated in STEMI; implicated in thrombosis; mechanism in acute coronary disease not fully characterized.
mechanism: DIDO1 is a circulating biomarker upregulated in STEMI plasma, reflecting platelet activation and thrombotic burden during acute coronary occlusion.

references.title: Proteomic characterization of human coronary thrombus in patients with ST-segment elevation acute myocardial infarction.
